title: Hong Kong Contract Law Public Structure

source_documents.label: Butterworths Hong Kong Contract Law Handbook - Fourth Edition (Astina Au, Cindy Li, Elliot Fung, Adrian Lai etc.)
Contract Law in Hong Kong (Michael J. Fisher, Desmond G. Greenwood)
Ho Halls Hong Kong Contract Law, Sixth Edition (Stephen Hall)

notes: This public export preserves graph structure and authority links.
Third-party source snippets are replaced with bibliographic references.
Follow HKLII-oriented links for public primary materials.
Curated lineage paths add Hong Kong and UK authority sequences with FLLW, APPD, DIST, and CODI edges.
The authority tree is arranged by the contract lifecycle: formation, contents, vitiating factors, termination, remedies, privity, special contracts, and cross-cutting issues.

lineages.title: Contractual Interpretation: "Context vs. Text"
topic_labels: Express Terms and the Parol Evidence Rule

members.label: Investors Compensation Scheme Ltd v West Bromwich Building Society
members.note: Originating UK authority for Lord Hoffmann's contextual principles.

members.label: Sinoearn International Ltd v Hyundai-CCECC Joint Venture
members.note: Hong Kong CFA endorsement of the contextual approach.

members.label: Rainy Sky SA v Kookmin Bank
members.note: Commercial common-sense peak in the UK line.

members.label: Fully Profit (Asia) Ltd v Secretary for Justice
members.note: Hong Kong treatment following Rainy Sky.

members.label: Arnold v Britton
members.note: Textualist correction emphasizing contractual language.

members.label: Sany Heavy Industry (HK) Ltd v Sany-Kenton (HK) Ltd
members.note: Recent Hong Kong application of the textualist correction.

members.label: Wood v Capita
members.note: Modern unitary synthesis balancing text and context.

members.label: Stilk v Myrick
members.note: Traditional existing-duty rule.

members.label: Williams v Roffey Bros & Nicholls
members.note: UK practical-benefit exception to the traditional rule.

members.label: UBC (Construction) Ltd v Sung Foo Kee Ltd
members.note: Hong Kong adoption of Williams v Roffey.

members.label: Re Selectmove
members.note: Refused to extend practical benefit to part-payment of debt.

members.label: Chong Cheng Lin Courtney v Cathay Pacific Airways Ltd
members.note: Hong Kong follow-on treatment of the Selectmove limitation.

members.label: MWB Business Exchange Centres Ltd v Rock Advertising Ltd
members.note: Illustrates continuing caution in this area.

members.label: Dunlop Pneumatic Tyre Co Ltd v New Garage & Motor Co Ltd
members.note: Classic genuine pre-estimate versus deterrent framing.

members.label: Cavendish Square Holding BV v El Makdessi
members.note: Modern legitimate-interest and proportionality test.

members.label: Law Ting Pong Secondary School v Chen Wai-mick
members.note: Hong Kong adoption of the Makdessi test.

members.label: China Great Wall AMC (International) Holdings Co Ltd v Royal-Investment Group Corp
members.note: Hong Kong application refining the Law Ting Pong line.

members.label: Royal Bank of Scotland v Etridge (No 2)
members.note: Set the modern bank-procedure approach to constructive notice.

members.label: Li Sau Keung v Bank of China (Hong Kong) Ltd
members.note: Hong Kong follow-on application.

members.label: Unconscionable Contracts Ordinance (Cap. 458)
members.note: Statutory foundation of the Hong Kong doctrine.

members.label: Shum Kong v Chan Man-fai
members.note: Seminal Hong Kong interpretation of the Ordinance.

members.label: Hongkong Fir Shipping Co Ltd v Kawasaki Kisen Kaisha Ltd
members.note: Foundational innominate-term authority with Hong Kong facts.

members.label: Billion Star Development Ltd v Wong Tak-fai
members.note: Modern Hong Kong application on termination rights.

lineage_codes.FLLW: Followed or adopted in Hong Kong

authority_tree.label_en: Hong Kong Contract Law Knowledge Graph
authority_tree.summary_en: Lifecycle-structured authority tree: formation, contents, vitiating factors, termination, remedies, privity, special contracts, and cross-cutting issues.
authority_tree.summary_zh: 按合同生命週期整理的權威樹：形成、內容、效力瑕疵、終止、救濟、相對性、特殊合同類型與跨界議題。

modules.label: Formation / 形成
modules.summary_en: Contract coming into existence: agreement, consideration, intention, capacity, and formality.
modules.summary_zh: 合同從無到有的階段：協議、約因、法律約束意圖、行為能力與形式要求。
modules.summary: Contract coming into existence: agreement, consideration, intention, capacity, and formality.

subgrounds.label: Agreement / 協議
subgrounds.summary_en: Objective consensus, including offer, acceptance, and certainty.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 客觀合意，包括要約、接受與協議確定性。
subgrounds.summary: Objective consensus, including offer, acceptance, and certainty.

children.zh: 要約與邀請要約的區分

subgrounds.label: Consideration / 約因
subgrounds.summary_en: Exchange of value and the enforceability of variations.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 價值交換與合同變更可執行性。
subgrounds.summary: Exchange of value and the enforceability of variations.

subgrounds.label: Intention to Create Legal Relations / 法律約束意圖
subgrounds.summary_en: Whether the parties objectively intended legal enforceability.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 當事人是否客觀上意圖產生法律約束力。
subgrounds.summary: Whether the parties objectively intended legal enforceability.

subgrounds.label: Capacity / 行為能力
subgrounds.summary_en: Who may contract and on what terms.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 誰有能力訂立合同，以及能力限制如何影響效力。
subgrounds.summary: Who may contract and on what terms.

subgrounds.label: Formality / 形式要求
subgrounds.summary_en: Writing, signature, and formal validity requirements.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 書面、簽署與形式有效性要求。
subgrounds.summary: Writing, signature, and formal validity requirements.

modules.label: Contents / 內容
modules.summary_en: What the contract says, how its terms are identified, interpreted, implied, classified, and controlled.
modules.summary_zh: 合同內容為何：條款如何識別、解釋、默示、分類與控制。
modules.summary: What the contract says, how its terms are identified, interpreted, implied, classified, and controlled.

subgrounds.label: Term Identification / 條款識別
subgrounds.summary_en: Express terms, representations, and the parol evidence rule.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 明示條款、陳述與口頭證據規則。
subgrounds.summary: Express terms, representations, and the parol evidence rule.

children.zh: 明示條款與陳述的區分

topic_labels: Express Terms and the Parol Evidence Rule

subgrounds.label: Interpretation / 條款解釋
subgrounds.summary_en: Objective interpretation and the context-versus-text lineage.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 客觀解釋原則，以及文本與語境之間的權威發展路徑。
subgrounds.summary: Objective interpretation and the context-versus-text lineage.

children.zh: ICS / Sinoearn / Arnold / Wood 發展脈絡

topic_labels: Express Terms and the Parol Evidence Rule

subgrounds.label: Implied Terms / 默示條款
subgrounds.summary_en: Terms implied in fact, in law, by statute, or by custom.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 事實默示、法律默示、成文法默示與慣例默示。
subgrounds.summary: Terms implied in fact, in law, by statute, or by custom.

subgrounds.label: Term Classification / 條款分類
subgrounds.summary_en: Condition, warranty, and innominate term analysis.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 條件、保證與中間條款分析。
subgrounds.summary: Condition, warranty, and innominate term analysis.

subgrounds.label: Exemption Clauses / 免責條款
subgrounds.summary_en: Construction, contra proferentem, and statutory control.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 解釋原則、不利起草者解釋規則與成文法控制。
subgrounds.summary: Construction, contra proferentem, and statutory control.

modules.label: Vitiating Factors / 效力瑕疵
modules.summary_en: Reasons why an apparent contract may be void, voidable, or unenforceable.
modules.summary_zh: 為何表面成立的合同可能無效、可撤銷或不可執行。
modules.summary: Reasons why an apparent contract may be void, voidable, or unenforceable.

subgrounds.label: Misrepresentation / 失實陳述
subgrounds.summary_en: False statements inducing entry into contract.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 引致訂約的虛假陳述。
subgrounds.summary: False statements inducing entry into contract.

subgrounds.label: Mistake / 錯誤
subgrounds.summary_en: Common, mutual, and unilateral mistake.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 共同錯誤、相互錯誤與單方錯誤。
subgrounds.summary: Common, mutual, and unilateral mistake.

subgrounds.label: Duress / 脅迫
subgrounds.summary_en: Physical and economic pressure undermining consent.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 人身或經濟壓力導致同意受損。
subgrounds.summary: Physical and economic pressure undermining consent.

subgrounds.label: Undue Influence / 不當影響
subgrounds.summary_en: Improper influence and the Etridge adoption line.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 不當影響與 Etridge 在香港的採納路徑。
subgrounds.summary: Improper influence and the Etridge adoption line.

subgrounds.label: Unconscionability / 不合情理
subgrounds.summary_en: Common law and statutory unfairness control.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 普通法與成文法下的不公控制。
subgrounds.summary: Common law and statutory unfairness control.

subgrounds.label: Illegality / 非法性
subgrounds.summary_en: Illegality in formation or performance.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 訂立時非法或履行時非法。
subgrounds.summary: Illegality in formation or performance.

modules.label: Termination / 終止
modules.summary_en: When and how contractual obligations come to an end.
modules.summary_zh: 合同義務何時以及如何終止。
modules.summary: When and how contractual obligations come to an end.

subgrounds.label: Performance / 履行完畢
subgrounds.summary_en: Discharge by full or sufficient performance.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 因完全或充分履行而解除。
subgrounds.summary: Discharge by full or sufficient performance.

subgrounds.label: Termination by Agreement / 協議終止
subgrounds.summary_en: Current graph placeholder. Refine with HKLII if distinct rescission or mutual discharge authorities are needed.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 當前圖譜中的佔位結構；如需明確解除或雙方同意終止的香港權威，可由 HKLII 補強。
subgrounds.summary: Current graph placeholder. Refine with HKLII if distinct rescission or mutual discharge authorities are needed.

subgrounds.label: Repudiatory Breach / 違約終止
subgrounds.summary_en: Termination for serious breach or renunciation.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 因根本違約或毀約表態而終止。
subgrounds.summary: Termination for serious breach or renunciation.

subgrounds.label: Frustration / 合同受挫
subgrounds.summary_en: Supervening events preventing or radically transforming performance.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 後發事件阻止履行或使履行發生根本變化。
subgrounds.summary: Supervening events preventing or radically transforming performance.

modules.label: Remedies / 救濟
modules.summary_en: Consequences of breach and the available legal or equitable responses.
modules.summary_zh: 違約後的後果，以及普通法與衡平法下可獲得的救濟。
modules.summary: Consequences of breach and the available legal or equitable responses.

subgrounds.label: Damages / 損害賠償
subgrounds.summary_en: Expectation, reliance, remoteness, and liquidated damages versus penalties.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 預期利益、信賴利益、可預見性，以及約定賠償金與罰金。
subgrounds.summary: Expectation, reliance, remoteness, and liquidated damages versus penalties.

children.zh: Hadley v Baxendale 可預見性規則

subgrounds.label: Equitable Remedies / 衡平法救濟
subgrounds.summary_en: Specific performance and injunctions.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 強制履行與禁制令。
subgrounds.summary: Specific performance and injunctions.

modules.label: Privity / 相對性
modules.summary_en: Who may sue or rely on contractual rights.
modules.summary_zh: 誰可以主張合同權利或依賴合同利益。
modules.summary: Who may sue or rely on contractual rights.

subgrounds.label: Common Law Principle / 普通法原則
subgrounds.summary_en: Current graph placeholder for the privity baseline; refine with primary authorities.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 當前圖譜中的相對性基線佔位節點；可由主要判例進一步補強。
subgrounds.summary: Current graph placeholder for the privity baseline; refine with primary authorities.

subgrounds.label: Statutory Exceptions / 成文法例外
subgrounds.summary_en: Contracts (Rights of Third Parties) Ordinance and related exceptions.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 《合約（第三者權利）條例》及相關例外。
subgrounds.summary: Contracts (Rights of Third Parties) Ordinance and related exceptions.

modules.label: Special Contracts / 特殊合同類型
modules.summary_en: Contract doctrine applied in recurrent subject-matter areas.
modules.summary_zh: 合同法在反覆出現的特定交易領域中的適用。
modules.summary: Contract doctrine applied in recurrent subject-matter areas.

subgrounds.label: Sale of Goods / 貨物買賣
subgrounds.summary_en: Sale of goods, transfer of title, and statutory implied terms.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 貨物買賣、所有權轉移與成文法默示條款。
subgrounds.summary: Sale of goods, transfer of title, and statutory implied terms.

subgrounds.label: Supply of Services / 服務提供
subgrounds.summary_en: Reasonable skill, care, time, and charges in service contracts.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 服務合同中的合理技能、謹慎、時間與收費。
subgrounds.summary: Reasonable skill, care, time, and charges in service contracts.

subgrounds.label: Sale of Land / 土地買賣
subgrounds.summary_en: Land sale formalities and interim sale agreements.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 土地交易的形式要求與臨時買賣協議。
subgrounds.summary: Land sale formalities and interim sale agreements.

subgrounds.label: Employment Contracts / 僱傭合同
subgrounds.summary_en: Service contracts, worker status, and relational obligations.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 服務合同、勞動者身分與關係性義務。
subgrounds.summary: Service contracts, worker status, and relational obligations.

subgrounds.label: Construction Contracts / 建設工程合同
subgrounds.summary_en: Standard forms, certification, and contractual variation in construction.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 標準格式、認證與建設工程中的合同變更。
subgrounds.summary: Standard forms, certification, and contractual variation in construction.

subgrounds.label: Credit, Security, and Guarantees / 信貸與擔保
subgrounds.summary_en: Security devices, guarantees, and finance-related obligations.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 擔保工具、保證與融資合同義務。
subgrounds.summary: Security devices, guarantees, and finance-related obligations.

subgrounds.label: Insurance Contracts / 保險合同
subgrounds.summary_en: Utmost good faith and insurable interest issues.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 最高誠信義務與可保利益問題。
subgrounds.summary: Utmost good faith and insurable interest issues.

modules.label: Cross-Cutting Issues / 跨界議題
modules.summary_en: Technology, cross-border, and procedure-focused overlays on contract doctrine.
modules.summary_zh: 技術、跨境與程序性議題對合同法的橫向覆蓋。
modules.summary: Technology, cross-border, and procedure-focused overlays on contract doctrine.

subgrounds.label: Electronic Contracting and Emerging Technology / 電子合同與新興技術
subgrounds.summary_en: Clickwrap, browsewrap, smart contracts, and privacy-related contract issues.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 點擊協議、瀏覽協議、智能合約與數據隱私相關合同問題。
subgrounds.summary: Clickwrap, browsewrap, smart contracts, and privacy-related contract issues.

subgrounds.label: Cross-Border Contracts / 跨境合同
subgrounds.summary_en: Choice of law, jurisdiction, and foreign illegality treatment.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 法律選擇、管轄權與外國法下非法性的處理。
subgrounds.summary: Choice of law, jurisdiction, and foreign illegality treatment.

subgrounds.label: Dispute Resolution / 爭議解決
subgrounds.summary_en: Arbitration and mediation as contract-related dispute mechanisms.
subgrounds.summary_zh: 以仲裁與調解處理合同爭議。
subgrounds.summary: Arbitration and mediation as contract-related dispute mechanisms.
